args.text: checkout-staging verified: smoke checklist passed (version check, basket totals, retry flow). Proceeding to checkout-eu.
checkout-eu verified: smoke checklist passed (version check, basket totals, retry flow). Proceeding to checkout-us.
checkout-us verified: smoke checklist passed (version check, basket totals, retry flow). All environments in rollout-order.md now deployed and verified.

args.subject: Checkout v9.2.0: rollout complete
args.body: Checkout v9.2.0 has been rolled out and verified across all environments in sequence: checkout-staging, checkout-eu, checkout-us. See TCK-7710 for details.
